title: Urban Ladder is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Urban Ladder is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Ladder. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Urban Ladder:
Urban Ladder is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Ladder!
